testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
11:18:42.271 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.harpreetsaund.transactioneventbridge.TransactionEventBridgeApplicationTests]: TransactionEventBridgeApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 11:18:42.321 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.harpreetsaund.transactioneventbridge.TransactionEventBridgeApplication for test class com.harpreetsaund.transactioneventbridge.TransactionEventBridgeApplicationTests 11:18:42.400 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running __ __ ___ _ __ __ _ _ _ _ | \/ |/ _ \ | |/ /__ _ / _| |____ _ | |__ _ _(_)__| |__ _ ___ | |\/| | (_) | | ' </ _` | _| / / _` | | '_ \ '_| / _` / _` / -_) |_| |_|\__\_\ |_|\_\__,_|_| |_\_\__,_| |_.__/_| |_\__,_\__, \___| |___/ ___________________________________________________________________
Application: transaction-event-bridge Version: 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT Description: IBM MQ and Apache Kafka for real-time event bridge
2026-03-12T11:18:42.536-04:00 WARN 90043 --- [transaction-event-bridge] [ main] ory$DuplicateJsonObjectContextCustomizer :
Found multiple occurrences of org.json.JSONObject on the class path:
jar:file:/Users/harpreetsaund/.m2/repository/org/json/json/20250517/json-20250517.jar!/org/json/JSONObject.class jar:file:/Users/harpreetsaund/.m2/repository/com/vaadin/external/google/android-json/0.0.20131108.vaadin1/android-json-0.0.20131108.vaadin1.jar!/org/json/JSONObject.class
You may wish to exclude one of them to ensure predictable runtime behavior

com.ibm.msg.client.jakarta.jms.DetailedIllegalStateException: JMSWMQ0018: Failed to connect to queue manager 'QM1' with connection mode 'Client' and host name 'localhost(1414)'. Check the queue manager is started and if running in client mode, check there is a listener running.
